## Description
*Provide a concise description of the changes introduced by this Pull Request and their business/functional value.*

## Changes Made
- [ ] Added / modified feature logic
- [ ] Updated schema or database migrations
- [ ] Resolved security warnings or lints

## Verification Checklist
Before submitting this Pull Request, please confirm the following:

- [ ] **Type Check**: Code compiles cleanly with `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] **Lint Checks**: No errors returned by `npm run lint`
- [ ] **Build Check**: Local Next.js build passes via `npm run build`
- [ ] **Mobile Testing**: Layouts verified on mobile viewports
- [ ] **Desktop Testing**: Layouts verified on desktop viewports
